creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
While working on the update to dcc-dccd, I have decided to make an effort
on making this port more modernized and remove the @cwd depreciated bit. The
ALT_HOME Option will also need to be removed or reworked which changes the home
directory to /var/dcc. Libmilter no longer depends on sendmail and various
comments will also be updated to match current FreeBSD porting practices.

Patches will follow and suggestions on possible problems would be greatly
appreciated.
